content:
🌟 GEO-AI-Woo | PHP
🎯 Primary Use Case: To make WordPress and WooCommerce websites discoverable and understandable by AI search engines and LLMs through automated generation of SEO-optimized content and configuration files.
✨ Key Features: • Generates `/llms.txt` and `/llms.full.txt` for AI crawler visibility • Adds AI-specific metadata (AI Description, AI Keywords, Exclude from AI)
📖 Summary: GEO AI Woo is a WordPress plugin designed to optimize websites, particularly WooCommerce stores, for AI search engines and Large Language Models (LLMs). It automatically generates essential files like `llms.txt` and `llms-full.txt`, along with AI-specific metadata and crawler rules, to enhance content visibility and structure for AI crawlers.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
